---
title: "Pika map"
author: "Caitlin Mothes, PhD"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(tidyverse)
```


Read in the Pika locations
```{r}
pikas <- read_csv("data/pika.csv")
```

Make the data spatial
```{r}
pikas_sf <- st_as_sf(pikas, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
```

Static map
```{r}
# Map with cities marked
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = pikas_sf, color = "red", size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Pikas in Rocky Mountain National Park") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Interactive map
```{r}
tmap_mode("view")
```

```{r}
tm_shape(pikas_sf) +
  tm_symbols(col = "red", size = 4, alpha = 0.5)
```
